chunks.text: Tahir Ghani is a Visiting Professor at EECS UC Berkeley with email tahirg@berkeley.edu. He earned a PhD in Electrical Engineering from Stanford University in 1994 and a BSC in Electrical Engineering from the University of Engineering and Technology, Lahore, Pakistan in 1984.

Sampath Kannan is a Visiting Professor at EECS UC Berkeley with email sampathkannan@berkeley.edu. He completed a PhD in Computer Science at UC Berkeley in 1989, an MS in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science at Princeton in 1984, and a BS Tech in Electrical Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay in 1982.

Yi Ma is a Visiting Professor at EECS UC Berkeley, located in 333A Cory Hall, contactable at (510) 664 4565 and yima@eecs.berkeley.edu. His research interests include Artificial Intelligence (AI), Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), and Signal Processing (SP).

Yi Ma earned a Ph.D. in EECS from UC Berkeley in 2000, an M.A. in Mathematics from UC Berkeley in 2000, an M.S. in EECS from UC Berkeley in 1997, and a B.S. in Automation & Applied Mathematics from Tsinghua University, China in 1995. His office hours are by appointment in 333A Cory Hall, assisted by Jessica Gamble at 337 Cory, 510-643-5105, jessicagamble@berkeley.edu.

Allen Yang is a Visiting Lecturer at EECS UC Berkeley with email yang@eecs.berkeley.edu. Anthony Yen is a Visiting Professor with email tony.yen@asml.com, holding a PhD in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science from MIT in 1992, an EE from MIT in 1988, an SM from MIT in 1987, and a BS in Electrical Engineering from Purdue in 1985.

Anthony Yen's teaching schedule for Spring 2026 includes EE 290-14: Fundamentals of EUV Lithography, held on Fridays from 14:00-15:59 in Cory 521. This directory is property of UC Berkeley and cannot be used for commercial purposes; updates can be requested via eecsfac-updates@eecs.
